title: BUG: Closed/Private Workspace Not Working For NonProfit Plan

posts.author: kokamos (Andy)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi

Our nonprofit plan cannot create private/closed workspace but it’s showing in this article as well as pricing page that we can.
https://support.monday.com/hc/en-us/articles/4415733945490-How-do-I-know-I-m-on-the-nonprofit-plan-

Can Monday staff/community please check this out? We want to create some private workspace for donors data but cannot do it.

Thanks

posts.author: downingla2 (Laura Downing)
posts.cookedHtml: I am also having this issue with our nonprofit account. Has Monday.com staff addressed this bug yet?
